title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware

items.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute ‘flash charging.’ But there’s a catch.
items.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

items.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app

items.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee
items.description: Meta will allow rival AI chatbot providers to offer their services on WhatsApp for a fee, which ranges from €0.0490 to €0.1323 per "non-template messa...

items.title: Best Gravel Running Shoes (2026): Salomon, Adidas, Nike
items.description: The best new shoes in this hybrid, niche footwear style can take you from your front door, down the asphalt, and into the trees.

items.title: It’s official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk
items.description: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhil...

items.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
items.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

items.title: X revamps Creator Subscriptions with new features, like exclusive threads and shareable cards
items.description: X is rolling out a series of new features for creators, like the ability to offer paid threads and other marketing tools.

items.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
items.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.
